sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './QuizResults.css'; const QuizResults = ({ results, onRetake }) => { const { score, careers, courses, field, strengths, recommendations } = results; return (

🎉 Your Career Match Results

Based on your assessment, here are your personalized recommendations

{/* Score Section */}

Compatibility Score

{score}%
Match

Your answers show strong alignment with {field} careers

{/* Careers Section */}

Recommended Careers

{careers.map((career, index) => (

{career}

High compatibility based on your skills and interests

💼 {field} 📈 High Demand
))}
{/* Strengths Section */} {strengths && (

Your Key Strengths

{strengths.map((strength, index) => (
✅ {strength}
))}
)} {/* Courses Section */}

Recommended Learning Path

Develop your skills with these curated courses

{courses.map((course, index) => (

{course.name}

🏢 {course.platform} ⏱️ {course.duration} 📊 {course.level}
View Course
))}
{/* Recommendations */} {recommendations && (

Next Steps

{recommendations}
)} {/* Actions */}
Save to Profile
); }; export default QuizResults;
